docket_entries.description: SEPARATE STATEMENT OF FACTS IN SUPPORT OF OPPOSITION TO MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION (TRANSACTION ID # 75141238) FILED BY DEFENDANT APARTMENT MANAGEMENT CONSULTANTS, LLC
NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED. PLAINTIFFS MOTION DOES NOT COMPLY WITH CRC 3.1350(B). TRIABLE ISSUES OF FACT EXISTS, INCLUDING, 8, 9, 46, AND 63. THE COURT NOTES THAT A MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS FRAMED BY THE PLEADINGS. AT THE TIME THE MOTION WAS FILED AND AS LATE AS 11:50 A.M. ON DECEMBER 16, 2024 THERE WAS NO DISMISSAL OF PLAINTIFFS EPPS AND MARAVILLA-GUARDADO, THE MOVING PARTIES ON THIS MOTION .PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B) JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES ; CLERK: L. YOUNG ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-13-2025 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the balance of this case is dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: Rochelle East; Clerk Z. Dizon; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-21-2025 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-13-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
Off Calendar Dec-18-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Adjudication is DENIED. Plaintiffs motion does not comply with CRC 3.1350(b). Triable issues of fact exists, including, 8, 9, 46, and 63. The Court notes that a motion for summary adjudication is framed by the pleadings. At the time the motion was filed and as late as 11:50 a.m. on December 16, 2024 there was no dismissal of Plaintiffs Epps and Maravilla-Guardado, the moving parties on this motion.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b)
Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2024 Set For Trial On Jan-21-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-07-2024 Continued To Apr-24-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
